purpose: Clothing reference images for pixel-art game asset production.

excluded_members.Ava: Stopped activity on 2024-04-19; excluded from the active-member reference scope.
excluded_members.Carol: Entered live-stream dormancy on 2022-05-10; excluded from the active-member reference scope.

naming_convention.legacy_assets: Existing assets keep their current filenames until a deliberate batch migration is planned.
rules: member_key must be one of: bella, diana, eileen.
first_appearance_year is the year when the outfit first appeared publicly, not the download year or repost year.
sequence is a two-digit order within the same member and first appearance year.
outfit_slug is a lowercase English snake_case description.
Variants of the same outfit keep the same first_appearance_year and use a descriptive suffix.

assets.caption_zh: 常服立绘（信息栏高分辨率）
pixel_design_notes: Use the purple hair silhouette as the main identifier.
Keep the star hair accessory readable at low resolution.
Simplify black and white clothing blocks into high-contrast pixel shapes.

assets.caption_zh: 团服立绘（信息栏高分辨率）
pixel_design_notes: Use this for the shared idol uniform silhouette.
Prioritize clear shoulder, skirt, and boot shapes.

pixel_design_notes: Use warm pink and orange clothing accents.
Keep the brown hair silhouette and energetic pose language.
Simplify bows and layered clothing into a few strong pixel clusters.

assets.caption_zh: 团服立绘（信息栏高分辨率）
pixel_design_notes: Use this for the shared idol uniform silhouette.
Keep the sprite distinct through hair and accent color choices.

pixel_design_notes: Use long light hair as the main silhouette feature.
Preserve the cool blue, black, and white palette relationship.
Simplify the elegant outfit into clean vertical shapes.

assets.caption_zh: A-SOUL×欧莱雅男士 联动服装

rights_note: These files are stored as visual references. Verify usage rights before redistributing or using directly in a commercial game. For production sprites, create original simplified pixel designs instead of tracing or reusing the reference art directly.
